metadata.description: Quest v3 schema. Hand-authored tutorial quests carry concrete rewards. LLM-generated quests (via wes_tool_quests) emit rewards_prose only; a future reward materializer resolves prose to concrete numbers at quest accept time. Archive at turn-in lives in WMS / a future archive table.

quests.name: First Steps
quests.title: First Steps

description_full.short: Gather 5 oak logs for the Elder Sage
description_full.long: The Elder Sage wants you to gather 5 oak logs to prove your resourcefulness. Approach oak trees and use your axe to gather wood.
description_full.narrative: Every journey begins with a single step. Show me you can gather what nature provides.

completion_dialogue: Excellent work! You've proven yourself capable.
Take these rewards as a token of my gratitude.

metadata.narrative: The first quest given to all travelers. A simple test of gathering skills.

quests.name: Material Research
quests.title: Material Research

description_full.short: Collect 3 copper ore and 3 iron ore
description_full.long: The Wandering Trader needs 3 copper ore and 3 iron ore for his studies. Mine rocks to find these ores.
description_full.narrative: I study the properties of metals. Help me gather samples and I'll reward you handsomely.

completion_dialogue: Marvelous! These ores will be perfect for my research.
You have my deepest thanks, adventurer.

metadata.narrative: The Wandering Trader's research requires various metals. This quest can be repeated daily.

quests.name: Prove Your Worth
quests.title: Prove Your Worth

description_full.long: The Battle Master challenges you to defeat 3 enemies to prove your combat prowess. Venture into the wilderness and return victorious.
description_full.narrative: A warrior is defined by their deeds. Show me you can stand against the dangers of this world.

completion_dialogue: Impressive! You fight with the skill of a seasoned warrior.
I'm honored to grant you these rewards.
Continue honing your skills, and you'll become legendary!

metadata.narrative: The first true test of a warrior. Defeat enemies and prove your combat abilities.
